zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Wakeman於1591年3月27日出生在英國武斯特斯爾貝德利時，她的父親Francis Wakeman26歲，母親Anne Goode11588歲。她於1621年11月30日與William Davis在英國武斯特斯爾貝德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年12月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年73歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Wakeman于1591年3月27日出生在英国武斯特斯爾貝德利时，她的父亲Francis Wakeman26岁，母亲Anne Goode11588岁。她于1621年11月30日与William Davis在英国武斯特斯爾貝德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年12月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年73岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文。

nameMeanings.name: Wakeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wakeman ‘watchman, town guard’, also ‘municipal officer responsible for night-time security and the town musicians’. Wakeman was the title of the chief magistrate of the borough of Ripon until 1604, when it was changed to mayor. He was the head of the body of wakemen whose duty was to blow a cow's horn every night at nine o'clock. If between then and sunrise any burglary took place, it was made good at the public charge. See also Watchman .

variants.name: Watchman
meanings: Native American (Navajo): from English watchman, probably used as a translation of a Navajo term for this occupation, ha'asídí.
English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English waccheman ‘watchman, guard, sentry’, also used as a nickname for a person characterised by wakefulness. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Watchorn
meanings: English (East Midlands, especially Leicestershire): nickname apparently from Middle English wache ‘vigil, wake, watch’ (Old English wacce) + horn ‘horn’. Compare the discussion of Wakeman .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Wakeman was born on 27 March 1591, in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Francis Wakeman, was 26 and her mother, Anne Goode, was 11588. She married William Davis on 30 November 1621, in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 December 1664, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Wakeman est née le 27 mars 1591, à Bewdley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Francis Wakeman, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Goode, avait 11588 ans. Elle a épousé William Davis le 30 novembre 1621, à Bewdley, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1664, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Wakeman è nata il il 27 marzo 1591 nel Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Francis Wakeman, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anne Goode, aveva 11588 anni. Lei sposato William Davis il 30 novembre 1621, nel Bewdley, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1664, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Wakemanが1591年3月27日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベウドリーで生まれた時，父Francis Wakemanは26歳，母Anne Goodeは11588歳であった。1621年11月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベウドリーでWilliam Davisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年12月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベンにて埋葬された。

ko.New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이
ko.Unknown Location in New Haven, New Haven: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐
ko.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.lifeSummary: Martha Wakeman(이)가 1591년 3월 27일 영국 워스스터실르 뷰들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Wakeman(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Goode(은)는 11588세였다. 그녀는 1621년 11월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 뷰들리에서 William Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 12월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Wakeman nasceu em 27 de março de 1591, em Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Wakeman, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Goode, tinha 11588 anos. Ela casou-se com William Davis em 30 de novembro de 1621, em Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1664, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Wakeman родилась 27 марта 1591 г. в местности бюдли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Francis Wakeman было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Goode, 11588. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Davis 30 ноября 1621 г. в местности бюдли, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 декабря 1664 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Wakeman nació el 27 de marzo de 1591, en Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Wakeman, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Goode, tenía 11588 años. Se casó con William Davis el 30 de noviembre de 1621, en Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1664, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
